title: clerodendrum villosicalyx
intro: Clerodendrum villosicalyx, also known as the hairy glorybower, is a species of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, with its leaves and stems exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. The hairy glorybower is often prepared as a decoction or tea by boiling its leaves and stems in water, or used as a powder in traditional herbal remedies.
